title: attribution — declared entitlements
description: Six entitlement keys. `attribution_capture` is the master boolean feature gate — off = middleware becomes a no-op. `attribution_click_ids_advanced` gates the msclkid + sccid captures (Medium+). `attribution_rollup` gates the campaign performance rollup + dashboards (Medium+). `attribution_merge` gates cross-device profile merging (Enterprise). `attribution_import` gates bulk CSV import from external CRM (Enterprise). `attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended` extends touchpoint retention from 730d to 2555d (Enterprise). Every downstream growth-tier consumer (marketing, analytics, referrals) has its OWN feature gate — this module is a feeder, not a policy layer.

entitlements.description: Master feature gate. Off = AttributionMiddleware becomes a no-op; downstream marketing / analytics / referrals events attribute against a null profile. All tiers on by default — a tenant may explicitly disable for privacy-conservative deployments.
enforcedBy: AttributionMiddleware short-circuits when the tenant's attribution_capture is false
AttributionObserver refuses attribution create when the gate is closed
AttributionSnapshotBuilder returns null when the gate is closed (downstream events attribute null)
SDUI attribution dashboard hidden when features array does not include 'attribution.core'

entitlements.description: Medium+. Enables capture of msclkid (Microsoft Bing) + sccid (Snapchat) click IDs. Small tier captures only gclid + fbclid — the two largest ad networks. Small tenants using Bing / Snapchat lose that attribution.
enforcedBy: ClickIdExtractor filters the extracted click_id blob to remove msclkid + sccid when the gate is closed
SDUI campaign rollup surface hides the Microsoft + Snapchat rows when the gate is closed

entitlements.description: Medium+. Enables the campaign performance rollup + dashboards + GET /api/v1/campaigns/rollup routes. Small tenants can still see individual attribution profiles but not aggregated campaign performance.
enforcedBy: CampaignRollupAggregatorJob skips tenants without the gate
GET /api/v1/campaigns/rollup routes return 402 attribution_rollup_not_entitled when the gate is closed
SDUI campaign-rollup screens hidden when features array does not include 'attribution.rollup'

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables cross-device profile merging — MergeIdentifiedAttributionsJob dispatches on AttributionSubjectIdentified events. Non-Enterprise tenants leave anonymous + identified profiles side-by-side and attribute conversions to the identified profile only (partial-attribution — a compliance-safe fallback).
enforcedBy: MergeAnonymousAttributionsOnSubjectIdentified hook short-circuits when the gate is closed
POST /api/v1/attributions/{attribution}/merge route returns 402 attribution_merge_not_entitled when the gate is closed
attribution:merge CLI refuses when the target tenant lacks the entitlement
SDUI merge dialog hidden when features array does not include 'attribution.merge'

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables bulk CSV import of historical attribution data from external CRMs (Salesforce, HubSpot, Segment). POST /api/v1/attributions/import accepts a signed CSV upload; each row creates a fresh attributions + attribution_touchpoints record.
enforcedBy: POST /api/v1/attributions/import route returns 402 attribution_import_not_entitled when the gate is closed
SDUI import wizard hidden when features array does not include 'attribution.import'

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Extends touchpoint retention from 730 days (2 years) to 2555 days (7 years). Aligns with financial-record retention downstream (Wave 5 finance module invoices/subscriptions retain 7 years — attribution data on those events must survive as long).
enforcedBy: PurgeArchivedAttributionsJob reads the entitlement to select the retention window per tenant
SDUI retention-window indicator on the attribution dashboard shows 2 or 7 years based on the gate
